catalysts.event: USS Spruance seizure of Touska / Iran retaliation vow — Hormuz escalation
catalysts.notes: Propulsion disabled; crew evacuated. Iran vowed retaliation; Islamabad talks in doubt.

catalysts.event: Iran-US ceasefire expiry — 3 nuclear sticking points unresolved, Iran FM no talks planned
catalysts.notes: Binary: deal or resumption of hostilities. Houthi activation risk if no deal.

catalysts.event: TSLA Q1 earnings after close — consensus EPS $0.37/Rev $22.71B; Smart Est $0.30/-21% surprise
catalysts.notes: Margin pressure + below-consensus deliveries already logged. Terafab capex commentary key.

catalysts.event: INTC Q1 earnings after close — Rev $12.3B / EPS non-GAAP $0.00; options 11-12% swing
catalysts.notes: Open position. 18A external customer / Terafab = thesis validation. Stock +74% YTD vs $51 consensus PT.
March dot-plot: 1 cut in 2026. Rates currently steady. Iran war = uncertainty factor.

catalysts.event: GOOGL Q1 earnings after close (date corrected from Apr 22)
catalysts.notes: Rev forecast $107B (+19% YoY). Cloud Next Apr 22-24 pre-catalyst. Sum +2 watchlist — needs C+1.

catalysts.event: META Q1 earnings — same day as FOMC decision
catalysts.notes: Ad rev vs GOOGL. Dual event risk with FOMC.
Inflation follow-through post-energy shock. Key for FOMC path repricing.

catalysts.event: Xi-Trump summit Beijing — tariff de-escalation / Board of Trade mechanism
catalysts.notes: Current regime: 30%/10% tariff truce. Deal probability: medium. EWY most leveraged.

catalysts.event: Advance Retail Sales March (8:30am ET) — Chicago Fed proj +0.9% ex-auto, -1.1% real
catalysts.notes: First post-energy-shock demand-side read. Reschedule from Apr 16.

catalysts.event: CLARITY Act Senate committee markup — late April critical window
catalysts.notes: Miss this window = near-zero 2026 passage odds per Galaxy Research.
